article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.3. PRCC - PRC 2026 Park Development Projects - 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby's 10 Park Development Projects Planned for 2026–2027
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to receive a report outlining 10 park improvement projects planned for 2026–2027, including playground replacements, a new basketball court, spray park design, and trail upgrades — all funded through the City's 2026–2030 capital plan.
briefs.action_required: Check the City of Burnaby's project webpage and social media for feedback surveys on parks near your business.
